title: GRANDMA'S HOUSE MATERNITY HOME SERVICES - 211info
text: GRANDMA'S HOUSE OF CENTRAL OREGON GRANDMA'S HOUSE MATERNITY HOME SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Emergency and transitional shelter for pregnant and parenting youth and their children who are experiencing homeless or at risk of being homeless. Eligibility: Houseless youth ages 12-24 who are pregnant, experienced a miscarriage, interested in adoption, or have a child under the age of 5 Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 383-3515 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 383-3515 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for availability and information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Jefferson, Klamath Counties, and Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs (primarily serves Central Oregon but accepts referrals from other areas) SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Maternity Homes Post Pregnancy Shelter/Transitional Housing Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
